name: KqlGuard
description: Lint KQL detection rules for syntax errors and performance anti-patterns. Emits SARIF v2.1.0.
author: kql-guard contributors

inputs.name: path
inputs.label: Path
inputs.helpMarkDown: File or directory to scan. Directories are searched recursively for *.kql files.

inputs.name: version
inputs.label: Version
inputs.helpMarkDown: Release tag / image tag for download and docker modes. Defaults to the latest release.

inputs.name: format
inputs.label: Output format
inputs.helpMarkDown: Output format. SARIF surfacing (artifact + inline issues) applies to sarif only.

inputs.name: maxCost
inputs.label: Max cost
inputs.helpMarkDown: Fail the scan when a query's estimated cost exceeds this value. Empty = no cost gate.

inputs.name: schema
inputs.label: Schema file
inputs.helpMarkDown: Path to a schema.json for schema-aware validation. Empty = skip.

inputs.name: args
inputs.label: Extra arguments
inputs.helpMarkDown: Raw arguments appended verbatim to the kql-guard invocation (e.g. --strict --table-sizes sizes.json).

inputs.name: workingDirectory
inputs.label: Working directory
inputs.helpMarkDown: Directory to run from. Defaults to the pipeline working directory.

inputs.name: failOnViolations
inputs.label: Fail on violations
inputs.helpMarkDown: When true, fail the task when kql-guard exits 1 (errors, --max-cost breach, or --strict findings). When false (default), the task completes with issues and sets the exitCode output.

inputs.name: prebuiltPath
inputs.label: Prebuilt binary path
inputs.helpMarkDown: prebuilt mode only: path to the locally-built binary. Defaults to bin/Release/net8.0/linux-x64/publish/kql-guard.

inputs.name: publishSarifArtifact
inputs.label: Publish SARIF artifact
inputs.helpMarkDown: Publish the SARIF as a 'CodeAnalysisLogs' build artifact, rendered by the SARIF SAST Scans Tab extension. sarif format only.

inputs.name: logIssues
inputs.label: Log findings inline
inputs.helpMarkDown: Emit each SARIF finding as an inline build warning/error. sarif format only.
